title: koeleria vallesiana subvar. glabra
intro: Koeleria vallesiana subvar. glabra, also known as glabrous alpine Koeleria, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Koeleria vallesiana subvar. glabra include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
